title: The Last Painted Lady of Harlan Street
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: When a forger is found dead in his studio surrounded by perfect copies of a lost Renaissance fresco, the only person who can tell the real from the fake is his estranged daughter — a retired art restorer with early-onset prosopagnosia.
long_description: When a forger is found dead in his studio surrounded by perfect copies of a lost Renaissance fresco, the only person who can tell the real from the fake is his estranged daughter — a retired art restorer with early-onset prosopagnosia.
